description: Interactive counter app — demonstrates NoetherReact browser UI

ui.style: body { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; } .counter { text-align: center; padding: 48px; } .counter-value { font-size: 4rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 32px; } .counter-buttons { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; } .btn { padding: 12px 28px; border: 1px solid var(--edge); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-family: inherit; transition: all 0.15s; } .btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .btn-inc { background: var(--accent); color: var(--bg); border-color: var(--accent); } .btn-inc:hover { opacity: 0.85; color: var(--bg); }
